Combien coûte la construction d’une mais: How much does it cost to build a house in Togo?
Le coût dépend du standing et de la surf: The cost depends on the standard and the surface area. As an indication, our prices start at 330,000 FCFA/m² for standard housing and can reach 1,200,000 FCFA/m² for Prestige. Request a free personalized quote for an accurate estimate.
Une villa standard de 150 m² prend génér: A standard 150 m² villa generally takes 8 to 12 months, depending on the standard and finishes. Exact timeframes are defined together and included in the contract.
Je vive à l’étranger, comment suivre mon: I live abroad, how do I track my project?
Nous proposons un suivi à distance avec: We offer remote monitoring with regular photo/video reports and videoconferences according to your availability. A dedicated project manager is your single point of contact.
Oui. Le paiement se fait par étapes, au: Yes. Payment is made in installments, as work progresses. The schedule is defined together before the start of the site.
Oui. Nous intervenons sur tout le territ: Yes. We operate throughout the Togolese territory: Greater Lomé, Maritime, Plateaux, Centrale, Kara and Savanes regions. A geographical coefficient is applied depending on the area.
Garantie décennale sur la structure, gar: 10-year structural warranty, perfect completion warranty (1 year), professional liability insurance. All our commitments are contractualized.
Puis-je voir des exemples de vos réalisa: Can I see examples of your previous work?
Par respect pour la confidentialité de n: Out of respect for our clients' confidentiality, we do not publish photos of our sites. We can, however, provide you with verifiable references upon request during a meeting.
Comment AIAE se compare-t-elle aux grand: How does AIAE compare to large foreign companies?
Nous offrons une expertise technique de: We offer international-level technical expertise with local roots. This means: responsiveness, in-depth knowledge of the Togolese terrain, and fair prices without the extra costs associated with expatriate teams. Our founder was trained to European standards while perfectly mastering local realities.

AIAE est née d’une observation simple ::
AIAE was born from a simple observation: in West Africa, a client who
wishes to build must coordinate a multitude of stakeholders themselves
architect, design office, mason, electrician, plumber with no guarantee of
consistency or respect for commitments.
Fort de <strong>plus de 18 années d’expé:
Drawing on over 18 years of experience in civil engineering, a background as a
teacher-researcher, and solid training in business administration,
the founder of AIAE decided to offer a different model:
a company that masters the entire chain, from design to
realization.
<strong>Basée à Lomé</strong>, AIAE SARL:
Based in Lomé, AIAE SARL has a clear ambition: to become the reference in
West Africa for integrated solutions in construction, energy,
security, and prefabrication.
Notre savoir-faire en <strong class=\"te: Our expertise in civil engineering is rooted in over 15 years of field practice: design, sizing, realization, and supervision of complex structures.
Construction, énergie, sécurité, préfabr: Construction, energy, security, prefabrication four complementary divisions under a single brand, unparalleled in West Africa.
Bordereaux des Prix Unitaires <strong cl: Unit Price Schedules (UPS), 4 standardized levels of standing, detailed quotes line by line. Every franc is justified.
Délais, coûts et qualité inscrits au con: Deadlines, costs, and quality written into the contract. Late penalties. 10-year warranty. Contract signable before a notary.

capable of designing, building, equipping with energy, and securing their infrastructure,

CONSTRUIRE AU TOGO DEPUIS L'ÉTRANGER : <: BUILDING IN TOGO FROM ABROAD: HERE ARE OUR ANSWERS
Mon argent sera-t-il bien utilisé ?: Will my money be well spent?
Chaque franc est tracé. Vous recevez un: Every franc is tracked. You receive a line-by-line quote based on our Unit Price Schedule (BPU). Payment is made in stages, only upon validation of progress through photos and videos. No full payment is requested before startup.
Comment suivre mon chantier à 10 000 km: How to follow my construction site from 10,000 km away?
Rapports photos et vidéos hebdomadaires: Weekly photo and video reports sent via WhatsApp or email. Bi-monthly follow-up video conferences adapted to your time zone (evenings and weekends available). A dedicated project manager, reachable by phone and WhatsApp.
Comment payer en toute sécurité depuis l: How to pay securely from abroad?
Virement international vers un compte ba: International transfer to a verified Togolese bank account in the name of the company AIAE SARL. Clear payment schedule defined in the contract. No cash payments requested. Receipt issued for each payment.
Et les démarches administratives au Togo: What about administrative procedures in Togo?
Nous gérons tout pour vous : permis de c: We handle everything for you: building permits, utility connections (water, electricity, telecom), land formalities if necessary. You have nothing to manage on-site.
Quelle garantie ai-je que le travail ser: What guarantee do I have that the work will be well done?
Garantie décennale contractuelle sur la: 10-year contractual structural warranty. 1-year perfect completion guarantee. Detailed contract with technical specifications, signable before a notary in Togo for maximum legal security. Verifiable references provided upon request during an appointment.
Je n’ai pas encore de terrain, pouvez-vo: I don't have land yet, can you help me?
Nous pouvons vous conseiller sur le choi: We can advise you on the choice of land based on your project (area, soil type, accessibility). We are not real estate agents, but our technical expertise will help you avoid unpleasant surprises.
De votre <strong class=\"font-heavy text: From your first call to the handover of keys
<strong class=\"font-heavy\">Échange en: Video conference exchange adapted to your time zone. We listen to your project, your needs, your budget. Free and without obligation. Duration: 30 to 45 minutes.
Nous réalisons les études préliminaires: We carry out preliminary studies: technical feasibility, architectural sketch, detailed estimate based on the BPU with breakdown by item. Everything is sent by email for your validation. Lead time: 2 to 4 weeks.
Contrat détaillé envoyé par email. <stro: Detailed contract sent by email. Two signature options: remote electronic signature or signature before a notary in Togo for maximum legal security (a proxy can sign on your behalf if you cannot travel). Clear payment schedule, linked to verifiable progress milestones (foundations completed, slab poured, roof installed, etc.). First payment for project startup.
Pendant toute la durée du chantier : <st: Throughout the duration of the project: weekly photo and video reports, bi-monthly follow-up video conferences, immediate alerts in case of decisions to be made. Your project manager is reachable by phone and WhatsApp.
<strong class=\"font-heavy\">Procès-verb: Handover report established during your visit to Togo or via detailed video conference. Observations noted and corrected. Delivery of keys and complete technical documentation (execution plans, reports, warranties).
<strong class=\"font-heavy\">Garantie de: 1-year perfect completion guarantee: any defect found is repaired free of charge. 10-year structural warranty. Your AIAE contact remains available after delivery.
Puis-je lancer un projet sans être physi: Can I start a project without being physically in Togo?
Oui, absolument. Tout le processus est c: Yes, absolutely. The entire process is designed to be managed remotely: studies, contract, payments, monitoring. Your presence is only desirable for the final handover, and even this step can be done via video.
Dans quels pays avez-vous des clients de: In which countries do you have diaspora clients?
Nous accompagnons des clients résidant e: We support clients living in France, Canada, the USA, Germany, Belgium, Switzerland, the UK, and other countries. Our organization is adapted to all time zones.
Quel est le budget minimum pour un proje: What is the minimum budget for a project?
Pour une villa Standard de 100 m² en zon: For a Standard 100 m² villa in the Greater Lomé area, expect to pay from 33 million FCFA (approximately €50,000) for construction alone. This amount varies according to the standard, surface area, and location. Use our online simulator for a personalized estimate.
De 8 à 18 mois selon la surface et le st: From 8 to 18 months depending on the surface area and the standard. A Standard 150 m² villa takes about 8-12 months. Deadlines are contractual.
Puis-je combiner construction et énergie: Can I combine construction and solar energy?
Oui, c’est même l’un de nos atouts majeu: Yes, it is even one of our major assets. Our Energy Division (launching 2026) allows for the integration of a solar installation right from the design stage of your building. One point of contact, one contract, one energy-autonomous home.
Avez-vous un représentant en France / Eu: Do you have a representative in France / Europe?
Nous n’avons pas de bureau physique en E: We do not have a physical office in Europe, but in-person meetings can be organized occasionally during our team's travels to Europe. Outside of these periods, video conferencing remains our primary mode of communication.

<span class=\"font-light\">AIAE propose:
AIAE offers four levels of standing for residential construction.
Each level defines guaranteed minimum technical characteristics
: materials, dimensions, equipment, finishes.
Le standing Standard offre un logement <: Standard standing offers a functional and durable home at an optimized price. Ideal for a first real estate investment or a rental project.
<strong class=\"font-heavy\">Matériaux</: Materials: 15 cm blocks, 16+4 slabs, smooth plaster, economic paint
<strong class=\"font-heavy\">Menuiseries: Joinery: Standard anodized aluminum, single glazing
Le standing Confort constitue le <strong:
Comfort standing provides the best value for money.
Neat finishes, generous spaces, full equipment.
<strong class=\"font-heavy\">Matériaux</: Materials: 20 cm blocks, 20+5 slabs, scraped plaster, quality paint
<strong class=\"font-heavy\">Menuiseries: Joinery: Lacquered aluminum, double glazing in exposed areas
<strong class=\"font-heavy\">Sanitaires<: Sanitary: Design range, quality fittings, hot water
<strong class=\"font-heavy\">Électricité: Electricity: 2-row panel, RJ45 sockets, smart home pre-wiring
<strong class=\"font-heavy\">Cuisine</st: Kitchen: Granite/quartz worktop, laminated MDF cabinets
Le standing Premium offre des prestation: Premium standing offers high-end services with extensive customization. Pool included, 2-car garage, office and multimedia room.
<strong class=\"font-heavy\">Matériaux</: Materials: Formwork concrete or 20 cm blocks, thermal insulation, decorative plaster
<strong class=\"font-heavy\">Menuiseries: Joinery: Thermal break aluminum, full double glazing
<strong class=\"font-heavy\">Sols</stron: Flooring: High-end rectified tiles, parquet in bedrooms
<strong class=\"font-heavy\">Sanitaires<: Sanitary: Bathtub + suite shower, double vanity, design fittings
<strong class=\"font-heavy\">Électricité: Electricity: Partial home automation, architectural lighting, surge protector
<strong class=\"font-heavy\">Piscine</st: Pool: Minimum 8x4 m, technical room, 20-25 m² pool house
Le standing Prestige représente l'<stron: Prestige standing represents absolute excellence. Architect-designed villa with exceptional materials, full home automation and luxury equipment.
<strong class=\"font-heavy\">Matériaux</: Materials: Architectonic concrete, natural stone, high-performance insulation
<strong class=\"font-heavy\">Menuiseries: Joinery: Imported custom-made, triple glazing, motorized
<strong class=\"font-heavy\">Sols</stron: Flooring: Marble, travertine or imported solid parquet
<strong class=\"font-heavy\">Sanitaires<: Sanitary: Designer brands, prestige fittings, private spa
<strong class=\"font-heavy\">Électricité: Electricity: Full home automation (KNX/Loxone), integrated generator
<strong class=\"font-heavy\">Piscine</st: Pool: 12x5 m infinity pool, heated, pool house bar

Au-delà du bâtiment, <strong class=\"tex:
Beyond building construction, AIAE has high-level expertise in engineering structures
and complex structures. This differentiating skill is based on over 15 years

Combien coûte la construction d'une mais: How much does it cost to build a house in Togo?
Le coût dépend du standing choisi et de: The cost depends on the chosen standing and the surface area. Our basic price ranges per square meter are:
* Prix de base hors coefficients géograp: * Base price excluding geographic and geotechnical coefficients, and excluding study fees. The actual estimate for your project is obtained via the online simulator or a detailed quote.
. Utilisez notre simulateur en ligne pou: . Use our online simulator for a personalized estimate, or request a free quote.
Les délais dépendent de la surface et du: Timeframes depend on the surface area and standing:
Les délais sont contractuels et inscrits: Deadlines are contractual and specified in the contract.
Intervenez-vous en dehors de Lomé ?: Do you operate outside of Lomé?
Oui. Nous intervenons sur tout le territ: Yes. We operate throughout the Togolese territory: Greater Lomé, Maritime, Plateaux, Centrale, Kara, and Savanes. A geographic coefficient is applied to reflect the specific logistical costs of each zone.
Quelle est la différence entre les stand: What is the difference between the standings?
Chaque standing correspond à un niveau d: Each standing level corresponds to a level of finishing and comfort:
fonctionnel et solide. Carrelage local,: functional and solid. Local tiling, standard aluminum joinery, vinyl paint. Ideal for first-time buyers.
qualité supérieure. Carrelage grès céram: superior quality. Porcelain stoneware tiles, reinforced aluminum joinery, acrylic paint, better insulation. Our core range.
haut de gamme. Faïence importée, baies v: high-end. Imported tiles, large glass windows, partial home automation, 3m ceiling height. For the demanding.
sur-mesure, matériaux nobles. Architectu: custom-made, noble materials. Personalized architecture, full home automation, exceptional finishes. Each project is unique.
Oui. Le paiement se fait par étapes, au: Yes. Payment is made in stages as the work progresses. The schedule is defined together before starting. You only pay upon progress validation, confirmed by visual proof (photos/videos). Never the full amount in advance.
Garantie décennale (10 ans) sur la struc: 10-year warranty on the load-bearing structure, 1-year perfect completion guarantee on all work, professional liability insurance. All our commitments are formalized in the contract.
Le terrain est-il inclus dans le prix ?: Is the land included in the price?
Non. Nos prix au mètre carré concernent: No. Our prices per square meter concern construction only (excluding land). The cost of land depends on the location and is not estimated by the simulator. Contact us for assistance in your land search.
Construisez-vous aussi des bâtiments com: Do you also build commercial or industrial buildings?
Oui. AIAE intervient dans 4 secteurs : r: Yes. AIAE operates in 4 sectors: residential (villas, buildings), tertiary (offices, shops, hotels), industrial (warehouses, workshops, factories), and agricultural (poultry farms, integrated farms). Each sector has its own pricing grids.
Puis-je lancer un projet sans être au To: Can I start a project without being in Togo?
Oui, absolument. Tout le processus est c: Yes, absolutely. The entire process is designed to be managed remotely: studies, contract, payments, monitoring. Your presence is only desirable for the final handover, and even this step can be done via videoconference.
Comment suivre mon chantier depuis l'étr: How to follow my construction site from abroad?
Rapports photos/vidéos hebdomadaires, vi: Weekly photo/video reports, follow-up videoconferences according to your availability and time zone. A dedicated project manager is your single point of contact. Instant alerts when a decision is needed.
Quel budget minimum pour un projet diasp: What is the minimum budget for a diaspora project?
Le budget dépend du standing, de la surf: The budget depends on the standing, surface area, and geographic zone. As an indication, for a 100 m² Standard villa in Greater Lomé, expect from 25 million FCFA (approx. €38,000) for construction alone, excluding optional equipment.
Ce montant inclut les coefficients géogr: This amount includes geographic and geotechnical coefficients, study fees, and management margin. It may vary significantly based on your project's specifics. Our online simulator provides a personalized estimate in 2 minutes.
Oui. Virements internationaux vers le co: Yes. International transfers to AIAE SARL's verified bank account. Receipt issued for each payment. Stage payments upon progress validation. Contract signable before a notary for maximum legal security.
Puis-je combiner construction et énergie: Can I combine construction and solar energy?
Oui, c'est l'un de nos atouts majeurs. N: Yes, it is one of our major assets. Our Energy Division (operational in 2026) integrates a solar installation from the design of your building. A single point of contact, a single contract, an energy-autonomous house.
Avez-vous un bureau en France / Europe ?: Do you have an office in France / Europe?
Nous n'avons pas de bureau physique en E: We do not have a physical office in Europe, but in-person meetings can be organized during our team's travels. Videoconferencing remains our primary mode, adapted to your time zone.
Le résultat du simulateur est-il un devi: Is the simulator result a quote?
Non. Le simulateur fournit une estimatio: No. The simulator provides an indicative budgetary estimate in the form of a range (minimum amount — maximum amount). It does not replace a detailed quote established after a technical study on site. To obtain a binding quote, please contact us.
L'estimation est basée sur nos prix de r: The estimate is based on our reference prices per sqm by standing, adjusted by geographical (logistics) and geotechnical (soil type) coefficients. Optional equipment (solar, borehole, swimming pool, etc.) is added with its own price ranges.
Oui. En créant un compte gratuit, vous p: Yes. By creating a free account, you can save your simulations, compare them, and return to them later. You will also be able to download a summary PDF (feature currently being deployed).
Pourquoi le résultat est-il une fourchet: Why is the result a range and not a fixed price?
Parce que le coût réel dépend de choix d: Because the actual cost depends on material choices, architectural complexity, and market conditions. The range gives you a realistic budgetary framework: the minimum corresponds to economical choices, the maximum to high-end choices within the chosen standing.
Le simulateur couvre-t-il les bâtiments: Does the simulator cover non-residential buildings?
Oui. Le simulateur propose 4 secteurs :: Yes. The simulator offers 4 sectors: residential (villas), tertiary (offices, shops), industrial (warehouses, workshops), and agricultural (farms). Each sector has its own parameters and price grids.
Oui. Notre Division Énergie (opérationne: Yes. Our Energy Division (operational in 2026) offers hybrid solar kits from 3 kWp to 50 kWp for businesses and professional buildings (C&I — Commercial & Industrial). Residential solutions can be integrated as part of a construction project. Each installation includes panels, hybrid inverter, LiFePO4 batteries, complete wiring, and commissioning.
Oui. Nous proposons des forages de 30 à: Yes. We offer boreholes from 30 to 120 meters depending on the depth of the water table in your area. The package includes drilling, casing, submerged pump, control panel, and a 2 m³ water tower. The simulator automatically recommends the appropriate depth for your geographic area.
Quels équipements optionnels proposez-vo: What optional equipment do you offer?
Énergie (solaire, groupes électrogènes),: Energy (solar, generators), security (alarm, video surveillance, access control), exteriors (fence, gate, borehole, swimming pool, landscaping), comfort (home automation, roller shutters, rainwater tank). All prices are in min-max ranges and can be viewed in the simulator.
Les équipements sont-ils inclus dans le: Is equipment included in the price per sqm?
Non. Le prix au m² couvre la constructio: No. The price per sqm covers the construction of the building (structural work + finishing). All equipment are options priced separately with transparent price ranges. You build your project a la carte.
Comment se déroule un projet avec AIAE ?: How does a project with AIAE proceed?
6 étapes : (1) Premier contact et recuei: 6 steps: (1) First contact and collection of your needs. (2) Technical study and detailed quote. (3) Signing of the contract and payment schedule. (4) Construction with regular monitoring. (5) Acceptance and handover of the keys with minutes. (6) Post-delivery follow-up (warranties).
Puis-je voir des exemples de vos réalisa: Can I see examples of your achievements?
Par respect pour la confidentialité de n: Out of respect for the confidentiality of our clients, we do not publish photos of our construction sites. We can however provide verifiable references upon request during an appointment.
Oui. Le devis inclut la conception archi: Yes. The quote includes architectural design (plans, sections, elevations) and the necessary technical studies. You receive a complete file upon delivery: execution plans, technical reports, guarantee certificates.
Le contrat peut-il être signé devant not: Can the contract be signed before a notary?
Oui. Pour une sécurité juridique maximal: Yes. For maximum legal security, the contract can be signed before a Togolese notary. A proxy can act on your behalf if you are not in Togo.
Que se passe-t-il en cas de retard ?: What happens in case of delay?
Les délais sont contractuels. En cas de: Deadlines are contractual. In case of delay attributable to AIAE, penalties are provided for in the contract. In case of force majeure (exceptional weather, material shortage), the deadline is extended by an equivalent duration, documented and communicated.
Oui. AIAE SARL dispose d'une assurance r: Yes. AIAE SARL has professional civil liability insurance covering any potential damage related to our activities, and a ten-year guarantee covering the load-bearing structure for 10 years after acceptance. Insurance certificates are available upon request during an appointment.
Nous offrons une expertise technique de: We offer international-level technical expertise with a strong local footing. Responsiveness, in-depth knowledge of the Togolese terrain (geology, climate, regional logistics), and fair prices without the extra costs associated with expatriate teams. Our founder has over 18 years of experience in civil engineering, trained to European standards while perfectly mastering the realities of the field in West Africa.
AIAE SARL a été créée en 2025, but l'exp: AIAE SARL was created in 2025, but the expertise of its founder dates back to 2007. Over 18 years of experience in the design and construction of civil engineering works, including many complex projects. The company is the result of a solid professional background, not an improvised adventure.
Cinq valeurs non négociables : (1) La qu: Five non-negotiable values: (1) Quality is paramount — we build for generations. (2) Our word is sacred. (3) Honesty towards the client. (4) Respect for subcontractors and workers. (5) Respect for deadlines and costs.
Quelles sont les divisions de AIAE ?: What are the divisions of AIAE?
Construction (opérationnelle) : résident: Construction (operational): residential, tertiary, industrial, agricultural. Energy (launch 2026): C&I solar installations. Security (launch 2027): safes, strong rooms, panic rooms. Prefabrication (launch 2027-2028): compressed earth bricks, prestressed concrete elements.
